results.rendered_html:
brāhmaṇī
1 A woman of the Brāhmaṇa caste.
2 The wife of a Brāhmaṇa.
3 Intellect; (buddhi according to nīlakaṃṭha).
4 A kind of lizard.
5 A kind of wasp.
6 A kind of grass.
Comp.
— gāmin m. the paramour of a Brāhmaṇa woman.
